description:
Lock in Persona as the KYC vendor (recommended per the architecture plan; see also Stripe Identity and Veriff as fallbacks) and execute their BAA.

**Why Persona over the alternatives**
- Signs a BAA without enterprise-tier pricing.
- Hosted **Inquiry** flow is the cleanest "drop you out, bring you back" pattern; we don't have to embed an SDK and pull KYC liability into our boundary.
- Webhook model is conventional (HMAC signature, retries).
- Pricing reasonable at our scale.

**Scope**
- Vendor due diligence: SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA posture, data residency (US-only).
- BAA executed + filed in `docs/compliance/baa-register.md`.
- Persona account configured with: an Inquiry Template Set (gov ID + selfie liveness + address verification), sandbox + prod environments, webhook endpoint registered to `https://staging.apoth.com/api/webhooks/persona` and prod equivalent.
- Webhook signing secret + API key stashed in Secrets Manager.
- Fallback documented: if Persona launches blockers, Stripe Identity is the next pick (caveat: ties more Stripe surface into our PHI boundary).

**Acceptance**
- BAA execution date recorded.
- A sandbox Inquiry can be created via the API and completed against Persona's test profiles.
title: KYC vendor selection + Persona BAA execution
